If you want a clean, reproducible setup, the most efficient route is the OpenClaw application template on Tencent Cloud Lighthouse. 2. **Select**: Choose **OpenClaw (Clawdbot)** under the **AI Agents** application template. For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Even if the template handles day-one setup, you still need a repeatable way to configure models, connect channels, install skills, and keep the gateway alive. # One-time onboarding (interactive) # Keep the agent running as a background service whoami export id. * Installing OpenClaw Skills and practical applications. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

content:

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. Selected channelsTelegram — simplest way to get started — register a bot with @BotFather and get going.Updated ~/.openclaw/openclaw.jsonWorkspace OK: ~/.openclaw/workspaceSessions OK: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions Selected Telegram with @BotFather Updated/.openclaw/ json Workspace OK/.openclaw/ Sessions OK/.openclaw/. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

Create a Discord application and bot. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --dry-run. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --strict-json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ​ Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ​ Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ​ Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ​ Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ​ Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ​ Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ​ Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. ## ​ Configuration reference pointers. ## ​ Related.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide | MI - Meta Intelligence
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Cron Scheduled Tasks Guide. Diagram of OpenClaw Cron scheduled task automation execution. If you're familiar with Linux's `crontab`, OpenClaw's Cron is conceptually similar -- it automatically executes tasks at specified times. But the key difference is: traditional crontab executes fixed Shell commands, while OpenClaw's Cron executes **natural language instructions**, with the AI agent autonomously deciding how to complete them. If a Cron task's execution time exceeds this value, the Gateway will forcibly terminate the connection, causing the task to be truncated -- the agent may have completed 80% of the work, but cannot return results due to the timeout. Cron is the key feature that transforms OpenClaw from a "passive tool" into a "proactive assistant." Once configured, the agent automatically executes tasks and reports results at your specified times -- you don't need to remember what to check, don't need to open a terminal, and don't need to be at the computer.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. --system-event "Reminder: review the weekly report" \. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. # Delete a job. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Share this post. ##### Company AI Operations Need Ontology: It Is Not Just IT’s Job. In recent years, enterprises have rushed into artificial intelligence (AI) hoping to boost efficiency, optimize.
